productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Carrot SPF 40 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Carrot is rich in carotene, a chemical that converts into vitamin A, credited with many healing properties. This nutrient-rich lotion is blended with pure carrot oil, extracts of carrot seed and lodhra bark, quince seed and aloe vera to keep skin soft, fair and moisturized in the sun. Protects skin with broad spectrum SPF 40 UVA/UVB sunscreen.Skin Type- For all skin typesUsage- Apply liberally before sun exposure. Reapply, as needed, after swimming or perspiring activities. Helps reduce the risk of skin aging, skin cancer and other harmful effects of the Sun.
